data.title: Access Management
data.description: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) and role-based access control to secure user accounts.
data.technical_spec: AWS IAM with MFA enabled for critical operations.

data.title: Encryption
data.description: Encryption of data at rest and in transit to protect customer information.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 for data at rest and TLS 1.2 for data in transit.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Measures in place to protect against distributed denial-of-service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield Advanced and AWS WAF for filtering malicious traffic.

data.title: Firewalls and VPCs
data.description: Enhanced security through virtual private clouds and firewalls.
data.technical_spec: AWS Security Groups and Network ACLs in place.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits and compliance checks.
data.technical_spec: Automated tools for continuous monitoring and vulnerability scanning.
